assertionResults.fullName: acItemToText canonical JSON-serialises structured acceptance gates with stable key order
assertionResults.title: canonical JSON-serialises structured acceptance gates with stable key order

assertionResults.fullName: buildFreshAcRows returns empty array for undefined / empty input
assertionResults.title: returns empty array for undefined / empty input

assertionResults.fullName: buildFreshAcRows assigns deterministic UUID-shaped IDs + source keys and 1-based ordinals
assertionResults.title: assigns deterministic UUID-shaped IDs + source keys and 1-based ordinals

assertionResults.fullName: buildFreshAcRows keeps AC ids independent from ordinal while source keys retain ordinal provenance
assertionResults.title: keeps AC ids independent from ordinal while source keys retain ordinal provenance

assertionResults.fullName: buildFreshAcRows fails loudly before DB write when duplicate canonical AC bodies collide
assertionResults.title: fails loudly before DB write when duplicate canonical AC bodies collide

assertionResults.fullName: buildFreshAcRows preserves AC text via acItemToText
assertionResults.title: preserves AC text via acItemToText

assertionResults.fullName: buildFreshAcRows projects structured gates as evidence_bound AC rows with canonical hashes
assertionResults.title: projects structured gates as evidence_bound AC rows with canonical hashes

assertionResults.fullName: planAcUpdate — create from empty (extend semantic) inserts all rows when task has no existing AC rows
assertionResults.title: inserts all rows when task has no existing AC rows

ancestorTitles: planAcUpdate — extend (was N, now N+M with prefix match)
assertionResults.fullName: planAcUpdate — extend (was N, now N+M with prefix match) appends new rows at maxOrdinal+1 and leaves existing rows untouched
assertionResults.title: appends new rows at maxOrdinal+1 and leaves existing rows untouched

ancestorTitles: planAcUpdate — extend (was N, now N+M with prefix match)
assertionResults.fullName: planAcUpdate — extend (was N, now N+M with prefix match) continues from highest existing ordinal even when ordinals have gaps
assertionResults.title: continues from highest existing ordinal even when ordinals have gaps

ancestorTitles: planAcUpdate — shrink (was N, now M < N with strict prefix)
assertionResults.fullName: planAcUpdate — shrink (was N, now M < N with strict prefix) moves trailing rows to history and re-inserts the kept prefix
assertionResults.title: moves trailing rows to history and re-inserts the kept prefix

assertionResults.fullName: planAcUpdate — replace-all (mid-edit / reorder / mixed) treats text drift as wholesale rewrite — all existing → history, all new inserted from ordinal=1
assertionResults.title: treats text drift as wholesale rewrite — all existing → history, all new inserted from ordinal=1

assertionResults.fullName: planAcUpdate — replace-all (mid-edit / reorder / mixed) reorder counts as replace-all (no prefix match → full rewrite)
assertionResults.title: reorder counts as replace-all (no prefix match → full rewrite)

ancestorTitles: planAcUpdate — idempotency (no-op when input equals existing)
assertionResults.fullName: planAcUpdate — idempotency (no-op when input equals existing) extend-with-zero-tail emits empty plan when texts match exactly
assertionResults.title: extend-with-zero-tail emits empty plan when texts match exactly

assertionResults.fullName: planAcUpdate — edge cases handles empty incoming (shrink to zero) by moving all rows to history
assertionResults.title: handles empty incoming (shrink to zero) by moving all rows to history
